summary: Iteration 17 - WebSocket Enhancement & Mobile OAuth Testing Complete. All features verified: 1) Backend broadcasts 'list_created', 'card_created', 'card_updated', 'new_comment', 'attachment_added', 'attachment_deleted', 'member_removed', 'board_updated' via WebSocket on respective API calls, 2) Frontend BoardPage.js handles all 18 WebSocket event types in switch statement, 3) Backend GET /api/auth/google accepts redirect_uri query param for mobile OAuth (returns 307 redirect to Google), 4) Login and board page work correctly with admin credentials.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/boards/{board_id}/lists returns list data and broadcasts 'list_created'
Backend: POST /api/lists/{list_id}/cards returns card data and broadcasts 'card_created'
Backend: PATCH /api/cards/{card_id} updates card and broadcasts 'card_updated'
Backend: POST /api/cards/{card_id}/comments returns comment and broadcasts 'new_comment'
Backend: POST /api/cards/{card_id}/attachments returns attachment and broadcasts 'attachment_added'
Backend: DELETE /api/cards/{card_id}/attachments/{file_id} deletes attachment and broadcasts 'attachment_deleted'
Backend: DELETE /api/cards/{card_id}/members/{user_id} removes member and broadcasts 'member_removed'
Backend: PATCH /api/boards/{board_id} updates board and broadcasts 'board_updated'
Backend: GET /api/auth/google accepts redirect_uri query param (returns 307 redirect to Google)
Backend: GET /api/auth/google without redirect_uri uses FRONTEND_URL default
Backend: WebSocket endpoint URL format is correct (/ws/board/{board_id})
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: Login with admin credentials works (odapto.admin@emergent.com)
Frontend: Dashboard shows workspaces after login
Frontend: Board page loads with Kanban view (lists, cards)
Frontend: 'Add another list' button works - creates new list
Frontend: 'Add a card' button works - creates new card
Frontend: Card detail modal opens on card click
Frontend: Card detail modal shows labels, due date, priority, description, attachments, checklist, comments, activity
Frontend: Board members button present
Frontend: Background picker button present
Frontend: Theme toggle button present
Frontend: User menu button present

Frontend: WebSocket handler covers all 18 event types (card_created, card_updated, card_deleted, card_moved, list_created, list_updated, list_deleted, member_joined, member_assigned, member_removed, new_comment, checklist_item_added, checklist_item_toggled, checklist_item_deleted, attachment_added, attachment_deleted, board_updated, card_activity)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py correctly implements WebSocket broadcasts for all CRUD operations on lists, cards, comments, attachments, members, and boards
Frontend BoardPage.js WebSocket handler (lines 183-392) covers all 18 event types with proper state updates
Mobile OAuth: Backend accepts redirect_uri query param at GET /api/auth/google (line 627-629)
Mobile OAuth: Frontend AuthContext.js loginWithGoogle() detects Capacitor.isNativePlatform() and uses Browser.open() with custom redirect_uri
Mobile OAuth: Frontend App.js listens for appUrlOpen events via CapApp.addListener for deep link handling
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_WebSocket_Card_3679 and TEST_WebSocket_List_4049 during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 verified WebSocket broadcast enhancements and mobile OAuth redirect_uri support. Key implementations: 1) Backend broadcasts WebSocket messages for list_created, card_created, card_updated, new_comment, attachment_added, attachment_deleted, member_removed, board_updated at respective endpoints. 2) Frontend BoardPage.js handles all 18 WebSocket event types in switch statement (lines 183-392). 3) Backend GET /api/auth/google accepts redirect_uri query param for mobile OAuth (line 627-629). 4) Frontend AuthContext.js loginWithGoogle() uses Capacitor Browser plugin for native platforms. 5) Frontend App.js listens for appUrlOpen deep link events. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_websocket_broadcasts.py

mobile_oauth_redirect_uri.details: GET /api/auth/google accepts redirect_uri query param for mobile (line 627-629)

frontend_websocket_handler.details: BoardPage.js handles all 18 WebSocket event types in switch statement (lines 183-392)

frontend_login.details: Login with admin credentials works correctly

frontend_board_page.details: Board page loads with Kanban view, lists, cards, and all UI elements
